content: The service is logging too verbosely in production. DEBUG is the default right now.
Change the default to WARNING in production and INFO in development. Use the LOG_LEVEL environment variable to override. Production deployments should never default to DEBUG.
Done. Let's make WARNING the floor — nothing below it unless LOG_LEVEL explicitly says so.
Implemented. Added a level_floor check in the logging config: if LOG_LEVEL resolves below WARNING (e.g. DEBUG in an env that forgot to set it), it's clamped to WARNING. Tests updated.
